segments.text: Today's puja is very important for us.
You all have got your Self-realization,
you've had the knowledge that it necessary to give realizations
To others and know what we already have
That' s very important because if
We do not try our hand
And If Do Not Try To Give Realizations To Others
Firstly, you will have no faith in yourself.
You'll have no self-esteem also
The second part is that
we try giving vibrations to other persons
but don't get involved with the person
I've seen some people who got too much involved
If they give realization one person
They think he has done a great job
and start working on his family
So, so far as you must have learned that one may be related.
One maybe closer to the person but not necessarily he will
had much of chance or self realization only way
grow is collective there's no other out if people think
by staying away from Ashrams alone living somewhere they
achieve much.
That's not the way Sahaja Yoga is meant, formerly people used to go to Himalayas and
most of them were separated – only one or two persons was chosen for spiritual
growth here it isn't question about spiritual growth its a question your collectivity growing
That is how you become a person who's collective, who enjoys collective.
Who works on collective and lives with collective
Such-a-person develops new kind of powers
And these powers are such that they're very subtle
but they penetrate into any molecule, atom or human beings anywhere and their penetration
is only possible if you have a temperament which collective. Without being fully collective
we cannot achieve that height –which very necessary today for Sahaja Yoga.
As you know, there are problems and problems all over as if we feel that the world is going
to sink. Especially when I went into America – my goodness! This a hell they have created
here… it's just a Hell because They don't believe in any Dharma completely
Completely they worship Adharma, and this kind of climate is flowing all over.
Allover the world you get reaction on American adharmic life
And people think there's nothing wrong in it
Whatever we may tell them
They will not believe
Nor do I think that its worth
But they don't see the destruction from the very basis of their life, their families
and societies.
The whole country I feel is filled with such ugly type adharmic nature that one cannot
even imagine how such ideas came into there heads – these ideas you know them well
But if you have to save your children,
You've got be an ideal guru yourself.
If just talk of Sahaja Yoga
and try assume that you are a sahaja yogi
also you try propagate Sahajyoga
without all these powers being awakened in you
it would be failure
So how develop this power within us we should see
It's rather embarrassing for Me to tell you how
You have to behave towards your guru.
I think people had told, but naturally
spontaneously as soon
As Your realization and grow in it
Naturally You develop
A very humble attitude
Also an attitude
Through which
You achieve lots of qualities, now supposing the guru is at a particular height and if
you try to go on same heights nothing will move towards him.
So must sit in place which much lower than the gurus', some people take too much
of my good nature, I should say.
And so many people have pointed out to Me
that you must correct these people
they talk with You on equal level and all
That!
They will learn a lesson
but sometimes it doesn't work
and then start talking in the same manner
as if you are talking
or your friend
First is complete humility
You have to be a humble person, extremely humble.
Now you check on that when
talk with others are you humble?
When think of other's ,are you humble?
When look after your wife and children
Are you Humble ?
That is very important thing for every
Person who thinks he' s Guru
Humility is the first quality, or I should say the ocean into which you must jump.
Some people think that if your humble Mother then
People will take advantage of You
Nobody can't ake advantage off
Because we have to remember another point
That you are protected all time looked after by Param Chaitanya
I know you, but how many really believe that there is Param Chaitanya with us?
If You are not subjected to all kinds of nonsensical ideas also.
But if think what will happen and how things will happen then Param Chaitanyas will come
You have to see the whole drama, how Param Chaitanya works out.
How it work's-out?
How you are behaving?
Supposing that your not in a proper shape and try show off too much then what happens
Then you get the reward for it – not that I do anything, but is a Paramchaitanya which
will teach your lesson and then to remember.
That You should have been little different from what we are doing after all
We need know why has He come to Sahaja Yoga?
Begin at root of It.
We have come to Sahaja Yoga because we wanted
To know the Absolute Truth.
And this absolute truth has been
Now known you through your vibrations
You knew it, Through Your Vibrations
What is The Absolute Truth
and should work everything on that line
That Absolute Truth
Whatever you feel On your Vibrations
you have to follow.
But unfortunately I've seen many people
think that their vibrations are all right,
they're alright and whatever
They' re receiving on the vibrations is first class
Now how do correct
That point Is very difficult
It comes from ego
When You Have Ego
You can never find anything wrong with it
And even if The Vibrations
Are telling something
It might be somebody else who's telling
Because you are not there, your ego is just spoiling and teaching things which normally
would see clearly that I am doing something wrong.
In this process of correction
when we indulge
You should see, are you getting subtler or grosser?
That is the best way to judge.
Now I've seen people who go on judging
all these small things like vibrations
whether this vibration
our alright and not in a tree
Or of flowers
On land
All kinds
Material thing they want
To see the vibrations
But for what are you seeing the vibrations?
You're seeing vibration because some sort of a material gain.
Do think that if we check the vibrations
and the vibrations aren't all right,
then they are quite safe –
will not lose this or Will Not Lose That!
It's no true
Because vibrations have not meant
to judge these worldly things
And worldly matters
It's absolutely cheapening the vibrations.
You should not cheapen them,
because vibrations can suggest things
which may be detrimental to your growth very much
Once I wanted somebody
To go somewhere
so he said,"I didn't mother."
and i said why?
Because I saw that the vibrations were bad
And then I asked him to leave
If the vibrations are good what was you use going there
That's the reason I asked you to go there, so that
You could help.
But before then you judged yourself, judged your vibrations and
Then we didn't want To Go!
So what happens?
We wanted have an easy cozy life
And all our problems must be solved by Sahaja Yoga
Otherwise we think Sahajyoga is of no use
Whatever Is Our Desire Must Be Fulfilled
So now the desires are mostly personal – my child is not well, so a child should be alright.
My husband's misbehaving and her husband shouldn't be all right or I have no house
then why must get out?
See how we're moving our mind still on very consumer society as they call it
We are all the time thinking now, I should have a son
instead of girl and you get a son then blame Sahaja Yoga for that.
Anything
according to your desire doesn't work out
Then it's Sahajyoga which has done harm
And we're suffering because of sahaja yoga
or this faith in sahaja yoga gets little moving
or we can say in a way, it's not that deep.
But if you are deeply embedded into Sahaja Yoga
then what happens?
What may come I will be as Sahajyoga
Supposing somebody dies
normally is Sahaja yoga
It´s difficult for people to die also
We must tell You
Even If they want To Die They Can't Die
Is the Param Chaitanya which decides for them
But supposing you take up a position like that,
still You must know
That this wish may not be fulfilled.
If it is not fulfilled then
if you feel disturbed and think what's wrong
but your wish
Is NOT the wish of God Almighty
while Paramchaitanya
IS the Wish
Of
God Almighty
Now for example I went to America
ticket like this. And America attacked Me, negativity and troubled me for all these
days I have suffered so-called – had pain…I've had all kinds of things but that
i had to do because now the American Sahaja Yogis will realize how much one has
pay to make this dumb head of Americans, to rise.
How stupid they are and how foolish they were enamoured by people who taking money!
So many came up with Me saying that if you start saying I can give for three hundred
You'll get thousand and thousands of disciples, I said they will not be My disciples.
If They come for money thinking that because i am taking the money it is worthy something
That means their absolutely stupid.
Sahaja Yoga you cannot getting by money this first principle don't understand most
Most of them don't understand that you can get Self-realization without paying any money.
There were some Gujarati rich people in New Jersey and they asked questions to Sahaja Yogis
– how is it possible, so easily? It's not possible because
It's a very difficult thing. All the shastras have said, everybody has said –
they're very difficult to get your Realization all right!
If so how is it you are giving this so easily? Why?
Nobody knew what or how answer these people
You should've say like that and alright
but its really difficult
And we cannot give mass through
But if somebody doing then
Then he will think about
How someone do
So this kind of stupid questions are there, and still if they go on you have to really
tell them in a very humble way.
Sir one has be worthy also."
They will run after people who just making money out
or fooling around with it – we have three gurus
somebody says seven gurus
but I wonder what must their condition?
So, the people who are extremely stupid – in Sanskrit they call mooda.
People that are brainless cannot get their Realization so give them up!
If you're arguing with You just give it to them
It's not there right to argue with You
Their Right is getting Realization
but Not a right to argue with You
ask You foolish questions and stupid question
But you should always remember that with that humility,
You must have your dignity intact because
Because once
Once know
One thing
Should be there
That
You will not behave like a joker all the time.
Your behavior
Will be dignified
At
The same
Time it would
Be very pleasant
Face or
A pleasant personality
It won't
Be annoying
Your personality itself will suggest that there's something special about you.
Now, how do we develop this kind of a personality?
The biggest problem in the West is ego
and the bigger problem with East is superego.
This ego business I don't know from where it has come
In all walk-of life they show how egotistical their are
For example when went to America
I was surprised that there is a racial problem and the blacks are treated in different manner
–and whites, too.
I mean color has to be given by God
And somebody who looks black or white
If everybody looked same it will look like regiment
There should some variety
There should be some change in the face and also,
In expression one has to a person carrying
better or different expressions.
Otherwise you will bored with such world
where everybody looks just same
but so much of racialism there
that I was surprised at how
it has worked into human mind.
So as a guru you must develop
complete detest for racialism,
complete detest!
That's very easy to understand
that anybody who is fair complexion
could be the cruelest man,
cruelest woman
and would be the cruelest mother also
And one whose black
will become kind, generous
It doesn't go with the color, temperament does not go with a colour.
But because blacks have been ill-treated so much that they react and they react naturally
in sometimes such manner it is very crude as well cruel but this kind of attention
And this kind of a, you can say wrong type attitude towards human beings.
Even towards animals they won't bear it so toward humans being to have such an attitude
itself shows that we are not worthy of Sahaja Yoga at all
So anyone who has the feeling somebody is black or white cannot be a guru in Sahajyoga
Then in India we have caste system, equally bad and horrible.
It has no sense in it is – No basis whatsoever!
But In india We Have people who believe
that some castes are higher And Some Caste are lower
Every caste People can do all the worst possible things
There Is not demarcation for them
An every low caste Can be very-very good
We have had many great poets and Sufis in the lowest caste in India.
These castes are man-made – you know, a man made cloth doesn't suit us!
And all these man-made ideas arenot going to shoot as it will lead
to a great dis… I wouldn't know its description, but
i would say – To A Complete Destruction.
Because hatred begets hatred and it goes on increasing
an increase if you cannot get rid of your
hatred then I will see that You are not a surgeon
these all conditionings
You were born in a white family, so you are White.
We're born into Christian families that's why we have Christian
.We've been born to the Jew family ,that is why we are Jews
All this just because your born with that
but does it mean higher or lower?
all problems of world today if see
are because of human attachment to nonsensical ideas
or superiority.
Only through collective living will change,
for example I would say in an ashram we should have
all colored people living together with the equal rights
and equal understanding
And love and affection
If that is not there no use calling it a Ashrama
Once they asked Me, Mother will you come and give a lecture in Harlem?
I said why not. So some Sahaja Yogis at Harlem,
mother what do You know about this Harlem is as I knew it's no harm
He says the blacks are there
And then he said that also black
We could call me Black or we can called White
But love was such thing
Love is such a thing that cleanses all these ridiculous ideas we have about other people.
To brand anyone as black and white shows you no eyes to see, any person with depth
Any person with loving heart cannot see these superficial things,
can not say today is a day where we are celebrating the guru's greatness.
Now look at all gurus how they were? How did they behave?
We have many in India and others, many Sufis
These Sufis or these saints that we had never believed in any caste system,
Never believed black and white. Christ! He never believed
In Black & White. Buddha never believed
In Black And White. Nobody believed
Any kind of man-made ideas
These are all man-made ideas which we have accepted and even after Realization,
We try to carry on with them.
Now by saying you do not get rid of it but acting with that
just see how You work out these stupid ideas within us
And How can Get Rid Of Them
Very simple is, in meditation you should sit down and see how many people You love.
And why do We Love? Not out of pity but just with love
How much we care for others!
I've seen some very beautiful examples like that
But still i must say there are certain fixed ideas
Which have to be dislodged completely
Very important for every person who is a guru in Sahaja Yoga, means he has to be clean hearted
open-hearted loving hearted fellow.
His Heart should play the tune of Param Chaitanya.
If his heart full all these man made ideas I don't know what will happen even when
transplant the heart. They cannot do it with a man-made, they have to use
real natural one so you can imagine when
try take all these odd ideas are just
divisive
They will never give you collectivity.
So introspection has to be made, are we one or
We're judging each other?
Now the judgment is quite a lot also
now all this can only seen when You live together
otherwise how would know
When start living together
you'll discover, start discovering what is missing in you.
What's not there?
It has to be there!
it so peaceful
To have a heart
which full of love
because every
movement
Of that Heart
Is So much
Joy
So Much Joy
This story
Of Shri Rama
That he ate
the bears, a kind of fruit which were first tested by an old lady with such love.
I mean shows what?
Shows that person like Sriram who was king
Of highest heritage and this old lady
Who is just from lowest caste gives him these fruits
with such love and when he eats that,
He starts praising it.
So his wife says give me some,
It's all right but the brother is still half way
I think in Sahaja Yoga so he doesn't like
–he gets angry
Then she eats
And She said Brother-in law
Wonderful fruit i must say
He says Allright Give Me Some
Why should l give you now?
Well first You were very much angry
So why should I give you these fruits to eat?
The story shows that the level of your personality as Guru
is judged by Your clean heart,
By You loving-heart
and by Your highest remarkable personality.
In a personality it's not something
which has been built in artificially
It is not artificial, it's natural – absolutely natural.
Whatever you do has to be natural so this artificiality of certain ways
or talking and living together creates problems
For example we had an ashram in America
in New York and there was a lady who was very strict, everything should be tipped off.
It should here the spoons must to be their and the folk
Should we hear all sorts of things? And she heard many people not important
this cultural I can call it the taboos are
Not important in Sahaja Yoga because now you have become a guru
Guru can stay anywhere, live anywhere eat anything any time that should be the case.
But also I have seen in Sahaja Yoga there are many who were very anxious to eat food
as soon it is served once It happened i was their they had served
The foods and just started removing the plates
And said what's matter?
Oh, you haven't not eaten, Mother?
No I have not yet touched it even.
So sort of first is the very lowest type
we should say desire
is hunger
Now a guru doesn´t bother
whatever he gave all right
Whatever he want
Not give alright
Even if don´t give
It's All Right
But one has to develop that
People feel very hurt if you serve them little later than another person.
These all kinds of funny things I've seen in Sahaja Yoga,
on the contrary it is a lowest type
or –I should say–a desire
which would not be much greater too
If we want to become real gurus
Of course many problems are solved
as i have see so far
that they do not take to drugs and they don't take to drinking
And all such things.
This is a blessing because if I had start from
That level,
How deep would have gone
From where i'd pulled you out
But this of course very big thing
It's quite nice but still
To make beautiful life out of it
which will attract the attention of everyone,
how you talk ,how behave and love.
So again one has to say that Guru Pada comes
only through The Love That You Have
Like they'll have ten people for anything
For a drama suppose
And They've it from Only a particular country
or from a particular group, then there's no fun.
There is not fun!
For example they'll have music groups
so for the particularly one caste could be
Or it would been religion
It will can say school
So that shows you are still
Not their as
So as a guru, you should like every kind of culture.
Every kind beauty and that has to be brought in our daily life we shouldn't look down
upon anyone for their color or race status class consciousness all this have been shown
in the lives of all these guru saints who lived.
Tukaramah says, Oh God! Thank God you have made me a schedule caste."
He was not but he just said so
All us...all time
should be conscious
what has been our birth
What is being personality
or what it's big name
One shouldn't able to make out
who is the saint and who he's not.
Even people are proud that they're saints!
I was surprised in America also very much
That Russians, who have gone there
Are a different quality of people
They wouldn't raise their eyes to Me
Wouldn' t raise their eyes
And were very deep, very-very deep
Vibrations where really deep
The reason i think
They have been oppressed during communism, perhaps maybe and now they've come to America
where there has seen so-called freedom in what nonsense it is doing.
So knowing these two extremes I think that
They have gone very deep into their own being, and they have such strength
And so much unity among themselves.
I was surprised that i had never met them before
They didn't come from Russia
Only came there
So what is it
that has kept them like this, is
they had no religion in their heads.
They have no religion!
To the every religion it's same
and there are no religions to follow
so a guru cannot belong any religion
because these religions also man-made
There created such problem all over
And we're fighting among themselves
How can be divine?
So you should not get involved into some sort of a religious bias – I have seen it, that
a Sahaja Yogi say if he is Christian then the bias will be shown.
That He's a Christian we can make It out!
If He' s a Jew You Can Make It Out!
So what's the use of coming to Sahaja Yoga?
Their attention, if it goes inside they'll find out.
You have to dissect yourself
To see what is wrong with you
and why is that
your are not very successful as a guru
The success for the Guru
Is he doesn't bother about time
Everytime in holy times
For he's not bothered if somebody is late or has come early.
He' snot a slave of watches and time, this also man-made
There were no watches about I think three hundred years back
And nobody was so particular
About the timing
So first thing
He is beyond time, Kala Teeth as you call it.
Then he's also Guna Teetha
Guna teetha means
that doesn't belong to the left side or
right-side of center
and he's beyond these three
Beyond this Gunas
where
he stands
And sees
everything in divine light
Everything
If something good happens to him
He said, the Divine Light has done it.
If something bad happens to him
he says that divine light wanted this way
everything he leaves for the Divine Light
is beyond the gunas
like supposing there's a person
who on right side egoistical
then you start saying how did
I want these things didn't work out and
will challenge
another we'll start crying
the left-sided one, that I'm very sorry this has happened to me.
It should not have happen at all or in
The center also he might think
That how far are my vibrations?
How could i not know and
All but a person who is
A real guru
He looks
At it as drama
Just witness of the drama
It was to happens so it has happened
Now what do we get out
You get something, the lesson that this was not right or
This is wrong. That's all! For
for moment to go on churning in your head
Thats'all one gets and he isn't bothered about anything else
So He goes beyond his gunas
Beyond Gunas He lives
He eats anywhere, sleeps anywhere
He is not bothered where he lives, he's not bothered whether he goes by car or he
goes by bullock cart.
He doesn't feel his heart –he has been not honored if they give him a garland of
few flowers–He does not bother because nothing can enhance His personality—nothing!
You give them something simple, it's all right or even if you don't give is alright.
It' s not he judges himself through your eyes but He judges Himself
though His own eyes and He sees for Himself the joy of enjoying Himself
What Is there to be so particular about anything?
What is so great to be hankering after anything, it just works out in its own time and if doesn't
–it does not.
what do you matter?
Just think of It also in Sahaja Yoga a guru has been binding force there are two types
have seen, which go on breaking relations. It's very easy for them – they go on complaining
but there are others who has a power to bind people together in such sweet manner that
the peoples brought closer together not so much as they forgive it automatically
It just works out like that, and people go on joining such a man.
I was surprised in America there were very few Sahaja Yogis.
We spent they said fifty thousand dollars
And got fifty sahajogis
One-thousand for one sahaja yogi
In America
So very bad shape
But still you see we have to hope
for them, because there are lots of seekers and lost in the wilderness
but I thought that maybe it's a circle.
They have to pass through this circle
of stupidity
And then definitely they will see
The point
It has happened
We had about 4000 people
For my lecture
Which never has happened
Nobody has got such a lot of audience, they said.
But still not many came but
They got their realization so I think gradually even in America it may start going
And the Sahaja Yogis must
Not only worry about there houses and where
they live and all that, but go all out to them.
I would say some of the Sahaja Yogis who could afford
should go America
And workout this outside
Work maybe if there are outsiders
Who come talk about Sahaj Yoga
They might be impressed
There so many false gurus
That you can't count
and they have accepted them. It's very surprising, though
They've suffered their lost in money everything still
They were accepted after all is our group so there
Is basically something wrong with their brains that
That don't understand what it to be expected
I have written one book perhaps
It may reach then but any case you
All can write your experiences
And things and can publish
Maybe it might help them to open their eyes.
While writing anything you have
remember that should show your quality of Sahaja Yoga,
how You are and in
That one shouldn't feel
that you're putting
Them down or trying
To say some things which will hurt
But saying It is such a manner
that it corrects them and helps them.
For a guru,
It is important
That he should not have
any false ideas about himself
He might be from poor family
Might be form the rich familly
Whateveritis
hshouldnotbeconciousofthat
Because once you become that
See look at Kabira
Hhe was just weaver
Lookat Tridas
He was just a, what do you call that, shoemaker.
See in India these are very low caste supposed to be
he has written beautiful poetry
then now and ever if it were the tailor
Just think of them
All this people have written
The same thing with such great beauty
Of poetry
How they achieved
because now they have entered into that great realm of spirituality.
You people also write some very good poetry, I know
but some other the people who've written good poetry
turned out to be very obstinate
really egoistical peoples
This is something i couldn't understand
you are writing here beautiful poetry and
Here we're full off egos
so from where this poetry's coming God knows
So first of all is yourself, your personality has to be something that people should say
this the real guru we have met.
For that you know very well – You don't give up Your family or anything but ego
if it's still there I do not what true saying
But you must get rid of it, completely and collectively also ego should be driven out.
Collectively!
It's a thing that people are egotistical secretly within themselves but sometimes
its shows is very subtle nonsensical disease
That the peopel have
And they just indulge into
On this day of Guru Puja I am to say now
that one has to work very hard,
the most important thing is
how much you have dedicated your life
and time
for Sahaja Yoga.
Then only will achieve
a state of Guru.
Look at Me I am housewife
And my family's
responsibilities problems
but despite that
I'm all the time thinking about Sahaja Yogis, Sahaj Yoga and
that is this emancipation of human beings in
whole world. Not only here or there
In The Whole World
So
That should be your widened vision
not for Only
Your school college
or university, or this and that.
But a very wider vision one should have
– at least you've to develop through your
working into every time of circumstances
Every type problems we'll have
Once you developed the kind of personality
then will be amazed how can help so many people
I know there are so many Sahaja Yogis here who are
worthy of praise, and really I love them very much
And they also loved Me a lot.
But one should always see that
as you are now going to be the gurus
You have to careful not think
That your are a guru
It's never thing you're a guru already
Once start thinking again Mr. Ego
The Guru comes up
So, once you decide that I am nothing –
I'm just a little ripple in the heart of My Mother.
If such an humble feeling is there
then all your problems can be solved
and things will work out
because Your attention
And Your behavior
Is going to impress other people
Nothing else
Whatever You may try
It is you who's going to get Sahaja Yoga further.
There so much be said about how
become a good guru and all that,
but I think i'll keep it for next Guru Puja
Thank You very Much
21 children
Children from 8-10
Shri Ganesha Mantra
Akshadi Shakti Adhi Shri Nihavadeva
Om Namaste Gaanapataye
Vamela Pragyakshyama Atma Manasi
Avashishyam, ava pashchadhat
ava purasdat
avo tarathat
Ava Daksha Nata, Ava Chokbharta, Ava Sarvatoma Pahi-Pahi Samanta
Tvam Maangmaya, Tvam Chinmaya
Tvam Ananda Mayaa, Tvam Brahma Maya
Tvam sacchidanandadvidyosi Tvam pratyakshan brahmasi
Tvam jnanmayo vijnana mayosih Sarvam jagdhidham tatojayate
Sarvam jagadidam tvattah sthistati, sarvaṁ jagadidam tvayi laya mēśatī,
sarvaṁ jagadidam tvai prathetī.
Tvām bhūmirāponalo nilo nabha,
tvām chatvari vākpadani,
Tvam guna trayatitaha, tvam deha-trayatitah Tvam kaala-trayatitah
Tvam muladhara sthitosi nitya Tvam shaktitrayatmakah
Tvam yogino dhyayanti nitya
tvaṁ brahmās tvam viśnūstvām rudras tvam indras tvam agni svam vayus tvam suryas
tvam chandramas tvam brahma-bhuvuvasvarom
gaṇādi pūrva muccharya varṇaadi tadarantaraḥ anussvāraha parattaraḥ
Ardhen Dulasita Tarenaruddha E tattava Manusvaroopam
Gakara Purvaroopa Akaro Madhyamaroopan
Anu Swaras Chantyaroopah Binduruttara Roopa
Nāda-sandhāna saitha sandihī
Saishā gaṇeś vidyā gaṇa karashe
Niṣchad dāya trichhandaha
Gaṇapatir devitah
Om gaṇa gaṇapatayena maha
Eka dantaya vighma he
Vakra tundā ya dhimahi
Tanno danti prachodayat Eka dantam chatur hastham
Pashaman kushadharinam Radhanchavardham
Hasterbhrifanam mūshakdhvajam Raktaṅ lambodaram
Shulpa karnakam rakta vāsasa Raktagandha nu liptaṅg
